definition:
1. well-looking, goodly, comely , of outward appearance, (Herdotus Historicus), attic; εὐπρ. ἰδεῖν fair  to look on, (Xenophon Historicus); εἶδος εὐπρεπής (Euripides) 
2. decent, seemly, fitting, becoming , (Herdotus Historicus); τελευτὴ εὐπρεπεστάτη a most glorious  end, (Thucydides) 
3. specious, plausible , (Herdotus Historicus); ἐκ τοῦ εὐπρεποῦς in pretence , (Thucydides) 
4. adverb -πῶς, ionic πέως, (Herdotus Historicus), etc.; comparative -πέστερον, (Euripides); Sup. -πέστατα, (Thucydides) (ML)
